era: Indie Pop. E=5 -- FIRST INDIE POP. Genre Stage 102. Post-hip-hop genre diversification. Capitol Hill. 'Flagpole Sitta' (1997). v1.49.331.

location.formative: Capitol Hill indie ecosystem. Venues, bookstores, coffee shops.

members.name: Sean Nelson
members.note: Writer-musician. Lyricist. The Stranger contributor. Post-Harvey Danger cultural commentator.

theory_nodes.concept: FIRST INDIE POP -- Genre Stage 102. Indie pop enters the engine. Post-hip-hop genre diversification begins. The axis splinters immediately after grunge (189).

genealogy.relationship: Harvey Danger at 190. Immediate genre diversification.

theory_nodes.concept: One-hit wonder complexity: 'Flagpole Sitta' (#1 Modern Rock) overshadows three quality albums and free release experiment (2005, predating Radiohead In Rainbows).
examples: Three albums of quality indie pop.
theory_nodes.description: One massive hit. Three excellent albums. More than the label.

genealogy.relationship: Harvey Danger at 190. The one-hit wonder who was more.

theory_nodes.concept: Capitol Hill indie ecosystem: venues, bookstores, coffee shops, cheap apartments. The neighborhood that produced literate indie pop. Contrast with Central District DIY grunge.
examples: Venues: Neumo's, Cha Cha, Comet Tavern.
theory_nodes.description: Capitol Hill indie ecosystem. Literate pop.

cross_references.relationship: GRUNGE TO INDIE POP! One degree. The post-hip-hop era splinters immediately. Foundational grunge to literate pop.
HIP-HOP PEAK! Two degrees earlier. E=8. The era ended at its maximum. Harvey Danger is the diversification.
DEGREE PAIR! Both understated. Harvey Danger too clever for mainstream. Minke smallest rorqual. Total E=9.
